visual_description: A man in a dark suit and tie is seen in profile, holding a walkie-talkie to his mouth. He is in a dimly lit room with multiple computer monitors in the background. The scene then cuts to a close-up of a computer screen displaying a list of phone numbers with the prefix '+852'.
audio_description: A male voice speaks in Chinese over a radio, followed by a series of beeps.
